---
title: "Hospital length of stay in Barbados, 2010-2023"
subtitle: "BNR briefing, 2023"
author: Ian Hambleton
description: "How long people stayed in hospital after stroke and heart attack events"
image: "/assets/images/listings/listing_sugarcane_field.webp"
image-alt: "BNR surveillance briefing illustration."
title-block-style: none
date: 13-Nov-2025
date-format: DD MMM YYYY
categories:
  - CVD
  - Briefing
  - Length of stay
  - 2023
sidebar: cvd
format:
  html:
    body-classes: bnr-briefing-page
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
page-layout: full
---

::: {.bnr-utility-card .bnr-briefing-action-card .my-3}

### View other formats

Use the slide deck for meetings, teaching, or stakeholder briefings. The PDF version is designed for printing, sharing, and citation.

::: {.bnr-utility-links}
[Open PDF briefing](pdf/bnr_cvd_los_2023_v1.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-primary target="_blank" rel="noopener"}
[Open presentation slides](slides/bnr_cvd_los_2023_v1_slides.html){.btn .btn-outline-primary target="_blank" rel="noopener"}
:::

:::

## Why This Matters | What We Did

{{< include ../../../_shared/snippets/briefings/cvd/cvd_los_2023_v1/why-this-matters.qmd >}}

This briefing focuses on three questions:

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.card .border-0 .shadow-sm .h-100 .bg-light}
::: {.card-body}

### How long do patients stay?

What is the typical length of hospital stay after stroke and heart attack events in Barbados?

:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.card .border-0 .shadow-sm .h-100 .bg-light}
::: {.card-body}

### Has length of stay changed?

How has median length of stay changed between 2010 and 2023, by event type and sex?

:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.card .border-0 .shadow-sm .h-100 .bg-light}
::: {.card-body}

### What does this mean for bed demand?

How do changes in typical length of stay translate into extra pressure on hospital bed capacity?

:::
:::
:::

:::



## Headline findings

Length of stay turns CVD surveillance data into service-planning intelligence: it shows not only how many patients were admitted, but how long hospital beds were typically occupied.

::: {.grid .mb-4}

::: {.g-col-6 .g-col-md-3}
::: {.card .border-0 .shadow-sm .h-100 .bg-light}
::: {.card-body .text-center .p-3}

<p class="text-uppercase fw-semibold small text-muted mb-1">Stroke<br>2022-2023</p>
<p class="display-6 fw-semibold mb-1">10 days</p>
<p class="mb-0 small">median hospital stay</p>

:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-6 .g-col-md-3}
::: {.card .border-0 .shadow-sm .h-100 .bg-light}
::: {.card-body .text-center .p-3}

<p class="text-uppercase fw-semibold small text-muted mb-1">AMI<br>2022-2023</p>
<p class="display-6 fw-semibold mb-1">6 days</p>
<p class="mb-0 small">median hospital stay</p>

:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-6 .g-col-md-3}
::: {.card .border-0 .shadow-sm .h-100 .bg-light}
::: {.card-body .text-center .p-3}

<p class="text-uppercase fw-semibold small text-muted mb-1">Stroke<br>in 2023</p>
<p class="display-6 fw-semibold mb-1">1,372</p>
<p class="mb-0 small">extra typical bed-days<br>vs 2014</p>

:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-6 .g-col-md-3}
::: {.card .border-0 .shadow-sm .h-100 .bg-light}
::: {.card-body .text-center .p-3}

<p class="text-uppercase fw-semibold small text-muted mb-1">Stroke + AMI<br>in 2023</p>
<p class="display-6 fw-semibold mb-1">1,684</p>
<p class="mb-0 small">extra typical bed-days<br>vs 2014</p>

:::
:::
:::

:::

In 2022-2023, the typical hospital stay after stroke was longer than after AMI. Stroke also accounted for most of the additional typical bed-day pressure in 2023, compared with the 2014 baseline.



## Median length of stay

```{=html}
<p class="mt-3 mb-2" style="font-size: 1.15rem; font-weight: 700;">
  Typical hospital stay gives a service-planning view of
  <span style="color: rgb(139, 111, 180);">stroke</span>
  and
  <span style="color: rgb(164, 22, 26);">heart attack</span>
  burden
</p>
```

::: {.card .border-0 .shadow-sm .mb-4}
::: {.card-body}

![](../../../downloads/files/briefings/cvd_los_2023_v1/figures/cvd_los_median.png){fig-alt="Figure showing median length of hospital stay for stroke and heart attack events in Barbados from 2010 to 2023." width="100%"}

[Open full-size median length-of-stay figure](../../../downloads/files/briefings/cvd_los_2023_v1/figures/cvd_los_median.png){.small target="_blank" rel="noopener"}

:::
:::

## Key Messages | What This Mean

{{< include ../../../_shared/snippets/briefings/cvd/cvd_los_2023_v1/what-this-means1.qmd >}}



## Extra typical bed-days

```{=html}
<p class="mt-3 mb-2" style="font-size: 1.15rem; font-weight: 700;">
  Small changes in typical length of stay can accumulate into
  <span style="color: rgb(4, 81, 116);">visible bed demand</span>
</p>
```

::: {.card .border-0 .shadow-sm .mb-4}
::: {.card-body}

![](../../../downloads/files/briefings/cvd_los_2023_v1/figures/cvd_los_bed_demand.png){fig-alt="Figure showing extra typical bed-days for stroke and heart attack events in Barbados from 2014 to 2023." width="100%"}

[Open full-size bed-demand figure](../../../downloads/files/briefings/cvd_los_2023_v1/figures/cvd_los_bed_demand.png){.small target="_blank" rel="noopener"}

:::
:::

## Translating Hospital Stays into Demand for Hospital Beds

{{< include ../../../_shared/snippets/briefings/cvd/cvd_los_2023_v1/translating.qmd >}}

## Key Messages | What This Means

{{< include ../../../_shared/snippets/briefings/cvd/cvd_los_2023_v1/what-this-means2.qmd >}}



## Download the outputs

The briefing outputs are available in four formats.

| Description |  | Download |
|---|:---:|---|
| PDF briefing for reading or printing | {{< fa file-pdf >}} | [Download PDF briefing](pdf/bnr_cvd_los_2023_v1.pdf){download="bnr_cvd_los_2023_v1.pdf"} |
| View and use our briefing slide deck | {{< fa display >}} | [Open briefing slides](slides/bnr_cvd_los_2023_v1_slides.html){target="_blank" rel="noopener"} |
| Excel workbook with data and metadata worksheets | {{< fa file-excel >}} | [Download Excel workbook](../../../downloads/files/briefings/cvd_los_2023_v1/workbook/bnr_cvd_los_2023_v1.xlsx){download="bnr_cvd_los_2023_v1.xlsx"} |
| Full public output package, including DTA, CSV, YML, PNG, workbook, and README files | {{< fa file-zipper >}} | [Download ZIP package](../../../downloads/files/briefings/cvd_los_2023_v1/bnr_cvd_los_2023_v1.zip){download="bnr_cvd_los_2023_v1.zip"} |


## Suggested Citation

> Barbados National Registry. *Hospital length of stay in Barbados, 2010-2023: BNR CVD briefing, 2023*. Barbados National Chronic Disease Registry, The University of the West Indies. Available at: https://uwi-bnr.github.io/info-hub/surveillance/cvd/briefings/hospital-los.html. Accessed: [insert date accessed].
